---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the Hotel Management System
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ChitrakVerma
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

---

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

(e.g., *"Currently there is no way to view room availability by date range, which makes it difficult to plan bookings efficiently."*)

---

## 📋 Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How should it work?

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why are they insufficient?

---

## 📐 Acceptance Criteria

Define what "done" looks like for this feature:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

---

## 🗂 Affected Module(s)

Which part of the system does this feature relate to? (check all that apply)

- [ ] Room Management
- [ ] Booking Management
- [ ] Guest Management
- [ ] Billing System
- [ ] Staff Management
- [ ] Authentication / Access Control
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / DevOps

---

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

If applicable, attach screenshots, diagrams, or examples from other systems.

---

## 📋 Additional Context

Any other relevant context, constraints, or dependencies.

---

## 🔗 Related Issues / PRs

- Related to #
